einstein.name: Albert Einstein
einstein.contribution: General and Special Relativity, Photoelectric effect.

noether.name: Emmy Noether
noether.contribution: Noether's Theorem linking symmetry and conservation laws.

newton.name: Isaac Newton
newton.contribution: Classical Mechanics, Calculus, Law of Universal Gravitation.

feynman.name: Richard Feynman
feynman.contribution: Quantum Electrodynamics, Path Integral Formulation, Nanotechnology.

lhc.name: Large Hadron Collider
lhc.objective: Testing the Standard Model and searching for new physics.
